segments.text: Last night was a night of complete darkness that they call it as Amavasya and just now
only the first phase on moon has started.
Today we are here to celebrate day when Sahastrara was opened out, also you have
It was actually a photograph of My brain which showed how the Sahasrara was opened out.
The light from the brain now could be photographed, something great these modern times have done
So this modern time has brought lot things that can prove the existence
of the Divine, also it can prove about Me.
It can convince you what I am."
This is very important because in modern times this advent has to be recognized –
Has To Be Fully Recognized!
This is one of the conditions for all the Sahaja Yogis.
Now let's see what happening in modern times,
In the brains or people
The brains and people today
if you seen there was an attack on the Sahasrara
There has been a attack since long
but in modern time it' s worst time
that they are trying to make the
limbic area very insensitive, very depressive novels ,very depressive thoughts and very
depressed music you can say like Greek tragedy nonsense.
All these things came from the medieval period till we should say this new age has started
That one itself was no good for our limbic area, that made us very depressive.
We took to alcoholism – to escape from these so-called miseries
But then came this modern age in which people became overactive
Overactivity started
With the brain also become over active
In addition to the dullness before, it's gone
into another extreme of overactivity.
So they dulled again
They took two drugs
and very horrible music
that is how
made this limbic area
very insensitive
so a drug which was
just stimulus
to begin with, was to be taken in greater quantity and later on they had
take the drugs which were of a much more severe nature.
Went down like that
And now we know
That this drug is
The only way people think
They can survive
Why?
Because
Of these tensions
they talk of.
In the modern times we have something called tensions, it was never there before people
ever talked about their tension now everybody says I am in a tension you give me attention
what is this tension?
It's because my advent and the limbic area wants to know about Me
And the Kundalini also, as Sahaja Yoga is increasing
Is trying to rise in people
because you become their channels.
Wherever You go
You generate vibrations
and these vibrations
give a challenge
To The kundalini or
A message
An in various people it rises
It may not raise upto the Sahasrara
Or it may even rise up to Sahastrara, but it falls back because there's no recognition.
So every time they do something this Kundalini comes out and gives them a pressure
–because their Sahasrara is not open–it' s the closed door!
Because of that closed door
This keeps them a kind of pressuring in head which
they don't understand and call it as tension.
Actually the Kundalini is trying to push itself out, but It cannot!
And those also who get their realization if They do not make Sahastrara all right
then go on getting into tensions so though Sahasrara has been opened up many years
Still we have some things to be done, which is clear out our Sahastrara first of all.
So the breaking up this Sahasrara then one it opened-out, the Brahma Randhra opened
out, then we started feeling the grace and it moved on to our Ida-Pingala – The Grace
not Kundalini.
And the Grace which is Chaitanya all around, soothed down left or right side by which
our chakras opened more and more threads of the kudalini started piercing through.
So I always tell Sahaja Yogis that it's important you must meditate, if your Sahastrara is
alright all your chakras will be alright because as we know that pithas or controlling
centres for these chakras are in brain around the limbic area so If your Sahastra
is clear. Everything works out in a very different way, how to keep the Sahasrara all right?
It's big problem always people ask Me! You know that I reside on the Sahastra.
I have incarnated on the lotus of one thousand petals, that's why could break it also.
As i am today as you see me off course they say Sastare Mahamaya so this is illusion
which all time there for You ,which very illusive .It had to be that way because
You could not have faced Me otherwise, with all the lights coming out of me or
The way you saw yesterday Sahastrara some sort of a abstract colors thrown on
All sides and the light's thrown outside. Please don't take photograph when
I'm speaking alright? You can later on there is no hurry about it just
Pay attention to My lecture please pay attention its important
It is to be told beforehand that nobody should take photographs during puja, because it
a very intense thing one has work out.
Please pay attention even if you don't understand
–it as effect on your…
So I would request You
To Pay full Attention
And I am talking
It works better
Now this Sahastrara used
to be looked after by you
Is the temple of
Your Mother
When you say, ''You put Me in the heart,'' actually You've put me on the Sahastrara.
Because as we know the Brahmarandra here is a fontanel bone area has got the pitha
–the center which controls the Heart–which it's seat of the Sadashiva or one can
even call it Shiva.
So when I am put into the heart-actually I'm put there so to raise from heart
there or to bring it from their heart is the problem of two types
people. Some people who are sensitive in
they're hearts, I would say in Europe we can
say Italians very sensitive on that
The first thing you do as soon
They see Me put their hands
To Their Heart and That
Is what It is that if
You try to feel me in your
to begin with, it's much easier.
To feel Me in your heart – now you might say how to do
It? You have love Me as I
Love you!
You've got to love each one of yourself
because all are within me and
And you cannot teach someone
How-to-love
Love is within
And love manifests
If just you open
Your Heart
Now what stops it, we should examine that.
Firstly the conditioning in the West
see to express your love is regarded as sinful actually
It takes them time say I Love You
but i hate you even a child would go on saying
I Hate YOU, I HATE YOU, I HATE YOU
But To Hate Someone Is Sinful
Anyone to hate is sinful
So, to say that I hate you – it's a sinful act.
What one has do is go on saying,"I love You."
After all we must love the person who so dearly loves us and does something good
for our loved ones but if Radishakti herself has given you the rebirth then it should
the easiest thing to love, and if she says that they are all within My body so should
be even easier –to-love each other.
So whole cleansing of the Sahastrara is done through this Love…this Love which
is not conditioned, which it's not inhibited – we doesn't want any respite or don'
t want return nirvaj. But the conditionings are too much! First
problem of conditioning comes to you when think that this condition makes me hate
or I cannot love someone because this is the condition.
But actually,
The conditioning itself
Is so absurd if you see it one by one
To make simple
i would like to understand
The conditioning part
Where
I read once an article interesting one
Who killed a romance
So he said that
hairdressers. I was wondering how is he connecting romance with the hairdressers? Because people
used to go a hairdresser and one say, hair dressing like by person so He would
said that i love that headdressing now supposing his fiance or wife wore another type of
because every day new things happen, then immediately the husband would say
oh I hate you for your hairdressing.
Because he loves one type of hair dress that's why
otherwise if we have another headdress
You hate it and don't like
To saying this is a sign
That conditioning is too much
You make a proper hair-dress and you dress up properly
And then suddenly people say,
Oh! I hate it.
Who are YOU?
What right we have got to say that
To anyone
You're not a judge
Appointed by any law courts
So why do We say
...to hurt someone
..To Say
I Hate It
On the contrary
....You must say
Alright
I like this, but you could do better – that's the sign of love where we want a person to
be dressed up in way which is appealing.
But it on very baser level we see people."
Then go further and see how intelligent he was?
How smart or charismatic he has been!
How charming, that's another word which is very elusive.
These are also kind of conditionings
in the mind
That you think a particular style
Of person
Is
A lovable
Person
You love
This
It so much outside
Or some people actually do not
Love but sure they love
Because somebody has more money
And he doesn't want to part with
No doubt
But
you love that person because he has more money, or he has a better car
,or is better dressed whatever it. So this kind of an idea one
have also his killer of love . If
Love Is Killed Joy Is Lost You Cannot Have Joy
Without Love I say joy and love both are just the same
Then it gets even subtler and subtler, then we start say loving our own children.
That's very common I mean of course also some people don't love their children
they are all kinds but when go on this is my child ,this
of the tree rises, goes to every fruit
and leaves, goes to every part
And comes back. It's not attached
If you are attached one
Part or flower because it is more beautiful
Then
The Tree will die
Flower also dies
So that death
Of love
You have to have
Love
which doesn't get entangled or attached.
Every time I tell like this, they say how to do it?
The love of the Spirit is that kind
Love
Of
Conditioned mind
Is different
A conditioned mind can love
In a limited way because It's condition
Then greatest enemy
Of love
Is ego within us
Which
is like a balloon on top of our head and this ego gives us very big tension.
The conditioning, off course lie – they see say for example the CAA carpet now it
according to their conditionings not good so there's a water carpet or something
This kind of conditioning, of very low level and the higher
at most is that you love your own country.
So my countries are best whether it's killing people
or destroying world peace
because I belong to a particular country
we can never criticize our country
It goes on subtler
But on the intelligence side it is even worse, because intelligently if you have understood
that something good then nobody can save. Because through your brain we've understood
actually its very surprising I was reading a book written by Rabindranath Tagore and
an Englishman had given beautiful preface to this introduction and he said
that the creativity is killed in the West.
So he asked a gentleman who was an Indian critic,
He said don't you criticize your poets?
You do not have people who are critics?
Yes yes we had they criticized
so what did they criticize
Oh! They can criticize
That this time there were no rain
So we had problems and things.
He said, no-no!
We are thinking about the poet."
Do they criticize a poet?
Do they criticize an artist to say is it meant for criticism?
It's created whatever he felt was created but supposing
that has put something very vulgar then of course
we don't like it. But if is created by a beautiful mind, has to be beautiful then you
do not criticize." He says," No because We cannot create
Like that so what business have You got
To Create?" This how intelligently What
Have done?
We have norms about everything
About art
About every creation
We don't like this carpet, why?
Because it doesn' t appeal to our intellectual understanding
of the norms we have reached
and in that frame
It does not fit in so we do nt like.
Can you even create one inch off that
So these ego gives You an unauthorized action
which is unauthorised, anadikarjishta
and unauthorized. You have no authority to criticize, you can't do anything so why should

– to criticize! If they're not worth of it then why should
you criticize them? And otherwise also we must know is a slave
Whatever your ego dictates and your intelligence, so-called intelligence brings you to a point

And then it becomes the collective ego of particular community or for country or for

So they say we think this no art that's the reason we cannot have master-sense

We can't have Rembrandt, we cant!

criticized criticized criticized so I think people had given up

It's created for myself as he would like to see it was beautiful very beautiful
Why didn' t You just say No use people will just criticize
i do is my own pleasure they'll spoil the whole joy of My creation
So one basic thing we should avoid is to criticize others
Better to criticize yourself.
Criticize your self, criticize your brothers and sisters
criticize you country, criticize all the habits
You have and laugh at Yourself is best way
If know how To Laugh At Your Self then
We will not object or we'll stand in a way
of any creativity Of another person

You can criticize anything which you have a right.

is the question one should ask oneself,
how we can criticize anyone?
As saints as are now of course
,you make out who's caught up
and who had bad vibrations
or what was the problem
.You know that
It's not conditioning

In Your love We have to tell that person if possible this wrong with us better be

telling Him away That he becomes even worse than What

Allow everybody to grow!

whom we can call as a very difficult family
they sort of crack their head or something

You see now the growth is possible.

the centre where both things in proper proportions
grow! In same way human being has
work out that you keep moderation and balance
understand not go extremes of anything

because once they go Out

but you have to show complete patience and complete understanding

To do something

the thought in Me
so would like to give Me a flower

If you reach a point where you understand that no, it's not use analyzing, synthesizing

It is just love – simple Love!
So the same Sahasrara which has been used before this brain for analyzing or criticizing

And there is the culmination where brain just loves, that's a situation one has to reach.
It knows only love because it had seen power of Love and then you see the point like Adi

and then he gives up. He said, no nothing.
And just writes the praise of Mother finished!
So once you reach that point
we can say now You are in Nirvikalpa because there is no vikalpa
There's not doubt on your head
Because you love In Love
We don't have a doubt No question
Only when I think
You doubt But When
You love
You don' doubt
Just love
Beacuse

and Joy is love

Shri Ganesha's mantra
Shri Mataji's three mantras
Ava-nuchanam, ava-shishnam, avapaschattat, avapurasthat, avottarathat, avadashinathat,
avachordhuathat, avadharathat sarvatumampahipahi samantat.
T'vaṁ vān māyās, t'vam cīn māyās, t'vaṁ ānanda māyās, t'vaṁ brahma-māyās.
T'vaṁ saścita nandat vidyoṣi, t'vaṁ pratyakṣaṁ brahmāsī,
t'vaṁ jñāna mayo vigyaṇa mayosī.
Sārbhaṁ jagadidām tvato jayate, sārbhaṁ jagadidām tvata śtiṣṭati,
Sarvam jagatidam tvayi laya mesyati
sarvam jagadidam tvaye pratiti
tvambhumira punaloni lonabha
tvamschatvari vakpadani
tvam gunatriya tita
tvam dehatriya titah
tvam kala triya titah
tvam muladhara sthityosini tyam
tvam shaktitrayathmaka
Tvam yogino dhyayanti mithyam, tvaṁ brahmā, tvaṁ viṣuśa tvaṁ rudharaśa tvaṁ indraśa
tvaṁ aninīs, tvaṁ vaiyuśa tvaṁ suvyas tvaṁ cantramasa tvaṁ brahma bhūrbhuva svaroṁ
gaṇadim purvām acaryavarnatiṁ tadānantaram
Ānuspharaparatara ardenula siddhaṁ daranardham
e tattva manushvarupam gākara pūrvārupam ākaro madhyama rūpam
Ānusvaras chantyārupam vinduruttarārupam
nādhāsandhanam sānita-sandi saśa gaṇeṣha vidya
Garakarishi, Nishkriyat Gagatri Chandra, Ganapati Devata, Ongam Ganapataye Namaha.
Ekadantaya Vidmaya Bhakra Tundayadi Mahi
Thanodanti Prachudhya
Ekadamtam chaturasthampashaman kusdharinam
Radhamchavardha Mastai Vimbranammusha Dvajah
Raktam lambodharan surpa karnakam, ragtavasa samrata gandhanu ribdham gam.
Raktapushpayi supujitam bhagtanukampinam devaṁ jagat karana māc yutam
avilbhūtam ca sustidyau prakṛte puruṣad parām
evaṁ dīya ithyo nityaṁ sa yogiyogi namvara
Namo Vrathapataye, Namo Ganapataye,
Namaha Pramata Patayee,
namaste astoolambodaraya
ekadantaya vigananashinde
shivasutaya shrivarada murtaye
namahasakshakshree adishakti
bhagavati mahataji
Sri nirmala devyai namo
